case.title: MISSOURI, K & T R. CO. v. HOLLAN

opinion.h1: MISSOURI, K & T R. CO. v. HOLLAN, 216 U.S. 615 (1910)
opinion.h2: MISSOURI, KANSAS, & TEXAS RAILWAY COMPANY, Plaintiff in Error, v. H. A. HOLLAN. No. 161.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. James Hagerman, Cecil H. Smith, and J. M. Bryson for plaintiff in error.
Messrs. C. B. Randell and Judson H. Wood for defendant in error.
Dismissed for want of jurisdiction.[ Missouri, K & T R Co v. Hollan 216 U.S. 615 (1910) ]
